title: DHCP, DNS, IPv6 Services, and Time · Incident Case: Net Dns Zones Roles
summary: Implement redundant address, name, and time services for clients, infrastructure, and secure operations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net dns zones roles increment in a validated core network-services design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish forward and reverse, primary and secondary, authoritative and non-authoritative, recursive, caching, and hosts-file behavior.
Use A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, NS, and PTR records with correct owner, target, and dependency semantics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
